$comment: To-Do settings. Normally managed from the panel's settings cog (writes to the database). 'accounts' holds connected Google accounts with per-list local metadata { id, title, color, enabled } (titles come live from Google). 'defaultList' { accountId, listId } is where quick-adds land. 'viewMode' is 'stacked' (all lists) or 'tabs' (one at a time).
